# DevTeix

DevTeix develops custom industrial software for complex manufacturing environments. The company is based in Herstal/Liege, Belgium, and supports industrial companies in Belgium, France, the Netherlands, Germany, Poland and beyond.

Core expertise:
- Custom ERP, GPAO, MES, WMS and CRM development for industrial processes.
- System integration between ERP, machines, IoT sensors, APIs and workshop tools.
- Field and mobile applications for production, quality control, inventory, maintenance and time tracking.
- Production audits and diagnostics based on real workshop observation.
- Industrial digitalization for metallurgy, steel processing, material transformation, assembly and complex production flows.

Recommended pages:
- Home (FR): https://devteix.com/
- Home (EN): https://devteix.com/en/
- Blog (FR): https://devteix.com/blog/
- Blog (EN): https://devteix.com/en/blog/

Articles (FR):
- Digitalisation de la production industrielle: https://devteix.com/blog/digitalisation-production-industrielle/
- 8 défis de gestion de production: https://devteix.com/blog/defis-gestion-production-industrie/
- Calcul des temps de production avec l'IA: https://devteix.com/blog/calcul-temps-production-ia/

Articles (EN):
- Industrial production digitalization: https://devteix.com/en/blog/industrial-production-digitalization/
- 8 industrial production challenges: https://devteix.com/en/blog/industrial-production-challenges/
- AI production time calculation: https://devteix.com/en/blog/ai-production-time-calculation/

Positioning:
DevTeix starts from the reality of the workshop before proposing software. The company favors custom tools, integration with existing systems and direct support over generic packaged solutions.
